start.speaker: The Shepherds
start.text: Welcome to the Delectable Mountains, pilgrims. You have escaped a dark house; breathe the clear air. From here, mercy lets the tired see the City before they reach it.

choices.text: Show us the City, and teach us how to finish well.
choices.text_zh: 把圣城指给我们看，也教我们如何善始善终。

text_variants.text: You have the look of one who lingered in the Interpreter's house and weighed every room — the lamp, the dust, the patient way. That kind of sight is welcome here. From these mountains, mercy lets the clear-eyed see the City most plainly of all.
text_variants.text_zh: 你有那种在讲解者之家里逗留、把每一间房都掂量过的眼神——那灯、那尘、那忍耐之道。这样的眼光在此处受欢迎。从这些山上，清眼之人看圣城看得最是分明。

text_variants.text: You have the unhurried look of one who knelt at every wayside chapel the road offered — even those no eye but Heaven's could see. Such quiet faithfulness sees far; from these mountains, the City will not hide from you.
text_variants.text_zh: 你有那种不慌不忙的神情，像是在路上每一座小堂都跪过——连那些无人、唯有天看得见的也跪过。这般静默的忠心看得很远；从这些山上，圣城不会向你藏躲。

text_variants.text: You carry yourself like one who has already arrived. Mercy still lets the tired see the City — but pride is a poor telescope. Look again, and lower your eyes a little.
text_variants.text_zh: 你的举止像是已经到达。怜悯仍让疲乏的人看见圣城——但骄傲是个糟糕的望远镜。再看一眼，把眼睛放低一点。

text_variants.text: You have learned to see truly on the road; it shows in your face. From here, mercy lets the clear-eyed see the City most plainly of all. Look, and be glad.
text_variants.text_zh: 你在路上学会了真正地看；这写在你脸上。从这里，怜悯让清眼之人看圣城看得最是分明。看吧，且欢喜。

start.text_zh: 欢迎来到喜悦山，朝圣者。你们逃出了一座黑暗的房子；呼吸这清新的空气吧。从这里，怜悯让疲乏的人在抵达之前先看见圣城。

warn.speaker: The Shepherds
warn.text: Two dangers remain. The Enchanted Ground will not roar; it will soothe you into forgetting. Beyond it runs a river with no bridge; only faith receives the crossing. Keep Hopeful close, and keep the City before you.

choices.text: We will remember: warnings are mercy, and the City is real.
choices.text_zh: 我们必记得：警告是怜悯，圣城是真实的。

warn.text_zh: 还有两样危险。迷魂地不会咆哮；它会把你哄睡，叫你忘记。过了它，有一条无桥之河；唯有信心能领受那渡过。把盼望带在身边，把圣城常存眼前。
